name: Gene Puerling
abstract: Eugene Thomas Puerling (March 31, 1929 – March 25, 2008) was an American vocal performer and arranger. Puerling created and led two prominent vocal quartets, The Hi-Lo's and The Singers Unlimited.

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: I was fortunate enough to work with him again on the – well not again but I mean work with him for the first time really on the Manhattan Transfer album we both wrote choral arrangements for that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
